description: Research venues for AI Growth Summit (100-150 ppl). Check Torquemason, Presidio, Fort Mason Gallery 308. Consider cost, location (ideally near Financial District), food options. Contact Matthew Panzarino for suggestions.
Coordinate w/ Marissa re 6/17 VC event. Ensure office presence 6/16-17. Plan catering: breakfast (parfaits, fruits, juices), lunch (salads, sandwiches). Stock fridge.
Schedule video day. Block Marcel's calendar. Coordinate w/ Jason to get Will for full day recording.
Schedule Zoom w/ Chris for Thu 1:30pm. Send invite, note he can suggest diff time.
Reschedule JPMorgan mtg to 12:15pm tmrw, 45min. Use separate conf room from Madrona/Fixer mtg.
